introSection: Rolling Thunder Mine Train was a steel roller coaster previously located at Genting Theme Park in Pahang, Malaysia. The ride was once an attraction at Parc de la Toison d'Or, however it was later relocated to Genting Theme Park.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Roller Thunder Mine Train on the parks website

fullText:
Rolling Thunder Mine Train was a steel roller coaster previously located at Genting Theme Park in Pahang, Malaysia. The ride was once an attraction at Parc de la Toison d'Or, however it was later relocated to Genting Theme Park.



Light brown track and supports.




 * Roller Thunder Mine Train on the parks website
